content.en:
Outside the Blood Abyss.

A group of realm gods stared at the corpses of the demon seeds that were thrown out, and they were immediately extremely shocked.

At the beginning, the demon seeds thrown out were still very weak, only a few ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm demon seeds, but later they threw out demon seeds comparable to the first level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Soon, there were more and more demon corpses comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Ten!

Twenty!

Thirty of them!

Fifty!

It didn't take long for more than a hundred demon seeds comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm~ to be thrown out.

Seeing this scene, these realm gods had an idea, that is, Ye Tian should not really be able to sweep the blood abyss!

"Impossible, even the God of the Underworld Realm doesn't dare to sweep the blood abyss, how dare the God of the Ye Heaven Realm?"

Some of the realm gods thought so.

However, it didn't take long for Ye Tian to reach the deepest part of the blood abyss.

Here, he was surrounded by more than sixty demon seeds.

Among them, there are only three demon seeds that are comparable to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and one of them is comparable to the demon seed that condenses the five Eternal Realm spirits.

Moreover, the environment here is extremely suitable for the demon seed, and the mid-level peak realm god of the Eternal Realm God Realm like the God of the Underworld Realm would not dare to kill the demon seed here, but Ye Tian was not afraid.

Ye Tian's strength is comparable to that of the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak realm god, and he is not afraid of the environment here, he is not afraid of demon seeds, so he is naturally not afraid of these demon seeds.

I saw Ye Tian casting a Sect Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique to kill these demon seeds.

The combination of Tianyan Red Dragon Flame and the Spear of the Ruin Sun continued to bombard these demon species.

Soon, one by one, the demon seeds were bombarded.

In the end, the demon seed that was comparable to condensing the five Eternal Realm Spirit Realm gods was also nailed into the void by Ye Tian, and Che Yu was killed.

Immediately, Ye Tian scraped the resources here, and then walked out of the blood abyss with these demon corpses.

......

Outside the Blood Abyss.

Ye Tian came out, took out the corpses of these demon seeds, and threw them on the ground.

"Everyone, the blood abyss has been cleared by me, and I will continue to clear the demon seeds in such places!"

With that, Ye Tian left.

And soon, there was still a single Eternal Realm God Realm, and he walked into the blood abyss, and sure enough, he couldn't see the demon seed.

Of course, these Eternal Realm God Realms still didn't dare to stay in the Blood Abyss for long, after all, this place was not suitable for the Eternal Realm God Realm, and it was still easy to be demonized.

In the following days, Ye Tian killed all the demon seeds everywhere.

After destroying the demon seeds in six or seven places, Ye Tian returned to the Endless Realm Alliance.

At this point, Ye Tian's strength had also shocked all the Eternal Realm Divine Realms in the Eternal Realm.

At this time, they no longer dared to hit the attention of the Endless Realm Alliance, after all, what even the gods of the Underworld couldn't do, Ye Tian did.

Boundary Division.

The God of the Underworld Realm was also extremely shocked to learn that Ye Tianqing had surrendered the demon seeds in the blood abyss and other places.

"Ye Tian is very hidden, I'm afraid that the last time he fought with me, he didn't show all his strength!"

The god of the underworld said secretly.

Anyway, he didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian.

......

Endless Realms Alliance.

During this period of time, no Eternal Realm God Realm dared to attack the Eternal Dao Realm of the Terran Race, so that the Eternal Dao Realm of the Terran would be relieved to go out and break through.

But.

The fact that the Tianhe Dao Alliance was destroyed by him does not mean that this matter is over.

"The Boundary Court Branch doesn't know much about intelligence, but the Tianhe Dao Alliance attacked the Endless Realm Alliance, and the Tianhe Dao Mountain in the Realm God Kingdom may know a little bit of information, and through this information, there is reason to suspect that I did it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

If Tianhe Daoshan really dared to come to him for trouble, it would be if they were looking for death.

At this time.

The realm of the gods.

Mt. Tianhedao.

Three Eternal Realm mid-level powerhouses are in a meeting, they are all realm gods who have condensed the five Eternal Realm Spirits, and a powerful force has three such realm gods, which is already very powerful, much more powerful than Momen, a powerful force near the Terran Holy Country.

One of the three Realm Gods, the Heavenly Providence Realm God, spoke: "A message has come from the Eternal Realm Realm, the Tianhe Dao Alliance has been destroyed, and dozens of Realm Gods have all been killed!"

"What, the Tianhe Dao Alliance was destroyed, who did it?"

Another realm god, the Liuhe Realm God, asked.

"The information from the Realm Court said that it was done by the Demon Seed, because in addition to those Realm Gods who were killed, the other half-step Eternal Realm God Realms and the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm that condensed the Eternal Dao Seed were all transformed into Demon Seeds. The God of Providence said.

However, the Liuhe Realm God shook his head, "I don't think it was the Demon Seed that did it, now is not the Demon Seed Invasion Period, and the Demon Seed suddenly attacked the Tianhe Dao Alliance?" "

The Heavenly Providence Realm God also nodded, "Liuhe Realm God, your guess is very reasonable, so I suspect that a certain Realm God did it." "

"Do you have any suspicions?" asked another realm god, the Vessel Armor Realm God.

"Yes!" The Heavenly Providence Realm God waved his hand, and Ye Tian's phantom appeared, "He is the Ye Heavenly Realm God, the founder of the Eternal Realm Super Large Eternal Realm Alliance Endless Realm Alliance and the leader of the Terran Race. Soon after, the Tianhe Daoist Alliance was destroyed. "

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, does he have the strength to silently destroy the Tianhe Dao Alliance, can they not even ask for help?"

The gods of the Liuhe Realm were shocked.

"I just learned that the Ye Heavenly Realm God swept through the blood abyss of the Eternal Realm and many places similar to the blood abyss, and killed a large number of demon seeds, even comparable to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, his strength is likely to be no less than that of the Eternal Realm Realm Underworld God. "

The God of Providence said.

"What, he is comparable to the god of the Underworld Realm, that is the realm god who condenses the six eternal realm spirits!" the god of the Armor Realm frowned.

If this is really the case, they Tianhe Dao Mountain will not be able to kill Ye Tian with all their might!

The Heavenly Providence Realm God said again: "At present, it is certain that this matter is most likely done by the Ye Heavenly Realm God, otherwise it would not be such a coincidence." And, even if he didn't do it, it had to be on his head. But what should we do, either take revenge or forget it, as if there is no such thing. "

"Can't forget it!" Liuhe Realm God said: "If it is really done by the Ye Heaven Realm God, then we have undoubtedly offended the Ye Heaven Realm God." He didn't do anything to us now, and it's very likely that his strength is not that powerful, if he gives up dealing with him, if he improves his strength in the future, maybe he will kill us easily. "。
